{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2103975?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Kocal", "id": 2103975, "login": "Kocal", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIxMDM5NzU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Kocal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49216", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Description The Stimulus controller shipped with `symfony/ux-autocomplete` renders AJAX response items into the dropdown by interpolating the `text` field directly into HTML template literals (`
${item[labelField]}
`) inside `_createAutocompleteWithRemoteData()`. The value is parsed as HTML rather than text, so any markup contained in the AJAX response is executed by the browser. When the dropdown values are derived from user-supplied content, an attacker can craft a string that triggers stored XSS in the browser of any other user who later opens a page containing an autocomplete widget backed by the same data. ### Resolution The `option` and `item` renderers used in `_createAutocompleteWithRemoteData()` now use TomSelect's `escape` helper to HTML-escape the value by default. Endpoints that legitimately return HTML (for example, to highlight the search term) can opt back in to the previous behavior by setting `options_as_html: true`. The `AutocompleteChoiceTypeExtension` normalizer that previously forced `options_as_html=false` when `autocomplete_url` was set has been dropped so the opt-in is reachable from the form layer. The patch for this issue is available [here](https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/842ae54bc74de389299f975f01aafae272cb0019) for branch 2.x (and forward-ported to 3.x). ### Credits Symfony would like to thank Alex Ashkov for reporting the issue and Hugo Alliaume for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00315, "percentile": 0.23537}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49216"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/symfony/ux/security/advisories/GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr", "https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/842ae54bc74de389299f975f01aafae272cb0019", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/symfony/ux-autocomplete/CVE-2026-49216.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/symfony/ux/security-advisories/GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/symfony/ux", "summary": "symfony/ux-autocomplete: XSS via unescaped AJAX response data", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:35:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mwqm-4fw3-cjvr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.36.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-autocomplete"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.2.0, < 2.36.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-autocomplete"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: symfony/ux-autocomplete: XSS via unescaped AJAX response data
